summary: Iteration 44 - Avatar Studio UI Refactor Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified the new 'Avatar do Apresentador' section on /marketing/studio page with photo upload, AI avatar generation endpoint, large preview area, and presenter warning message. Backend and frontend integration working correctly.

elements_verified: Section header 'Avatar do Apresentador' with Sparkles icon
Upload area with 'Envie uma foto para criar seu avatar' text
Hidden file input for photo upload
Section placed between Company form and Campaign Name

features: 'Avatar pronto' status indicator with check icon

video_mode_presenter_warning.condition: Shows when videoMode='presenter' AND no avatarUrl AND no activeCompany?.avatar_url
video_mode_presenter_warning.message: Crie um avatar acima para usar o modo apresentador

elements_verified: Platforms selection (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, etc.)
Video Mode options (Sem Video, Narracao, Apresentador)

critical_code_review_comments: pipeline.py lines 656-658: AvatarGenerateRequest model correctly defines company_name and source_image_url fields with defaults
pipeline.py lines 2590-2635: generate-avatar endpoint properly handles both text-only (no source image) and image-to-image (with source photo) generation paths
PipelineView.jsx lines 912-917: Avatar state management (avatarUrl, avatarSourcePhoto, generatingAvatar, avatarPhotoUploading) correctly initialized
PipelineView.jsx lines 969-1007: uploadAvatarPhoto and generateAvatarFromPhoto functions properly handle file upload and API call with error handling
PipelineView.jsx lines 1505-1610: Avatar Studio UI section correctly placed between Company and Campaign Name sections with all required elements
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - testing existing UI and endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44: Avatar Studio UI refactor COMPLETE. The 'Avatar do Apresentador' section is now a standalone section between Company and Campaign Name in the /marketing/studio campaign creation flow. Key data-testids: avatar-studio-section, avatar-upload-btn, avatar-preview-large, generate-avatar-btn, avatar-regenerate-btn, avatar-clear-btn, avatar-generating-indicator. Backend endpoint POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/generate-avatar uses Gemini AI for image generation. Video Mode 'Apresentador' shows warning when no avatar is set.
ui_verification_screenshots: Avatar Studio section renders with upload button
Presenter mode warning shows correctly when no avatar
Full form view showing Avatar Studio placement between Company and Campaign Name
